name: Atractylodes Macrocephala
summary: Atractylodes macrocephala contains Atractylenolide I and is linked here to PI3K/Akt modulation.
description: Atractylodes macrocephala contains Atractylenolide I and is linked here to PI3K/Akt modulation.
safetyNotes: Immune-modulating activity is plausible; use caution with autoimmune disease, transplant medicines, or immunosuppressants.
interactions: use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.

sources.title: Medicine for chronic atrophic gastritis: a systematic review, meta- and network pharmacology analysis
Atractylodes macrocephala-derived extracellular vesicles-like particles enhance the recovery of ulcerative colitis by remodeling intestinal microecological balance
Atractylenolide I inhibits angiogenesis and reverses sunitinib resistance in clear cell renal cell carcinoma through ATP6V0D2-mediated autophagic degradation of EPAS1/HIF2α

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Preparation varies by tradition and product form and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
